route_assessment.mode_rationale: Continuity BLOCKING value error is a single word fix. Anti-AI '不是...而是...' + dash#9 is local phrasing. Pacing door metaphor MINOR is local imagery. All issues are surface-level craft problems — no structural/narrative rewriting needed.

delegation_decisions.rationale: Direct textual error — single word fix within chapter-revision scope.
Per revision skill delegation rules, anti-AI surface issues should go to shenbi-anti-detect. However, pipeline mode has no separate anti-detect step invoked. chapter-revision handles as spot-fix.
Same as above — dramatic pause dash combined with '不是...而是...' fix in the same line.
Local imagery refinement — single metaphor replacement within revision scope. Too minor to warrant delegation to style-polishing pipeline step.

spot_fixes.rationale: Time continuity BLOCKING — Ch5 covered day 2→3, Ch6 is explicit next day (day 4). Matches truth/current_state.md and chapter_summaries.md.

spot_fixes.original: 他在那堆电路板前蹲下，刚伸手拨开一块塑料碎片——口袋里的手机震了一下。不是电话的震动，而是像收到短信时那种短促的一振。
spot_fixes.revised: 他在那堆电路板前蹲下，刚伸手拨开一块塑料碎片。口袋里的手机震了一下，一种像收到短信时那种短促的振动。
spot_fixes.rationale: Combined fix: (1) dramatic pause '——' replaced with period to eliminate AI-pattern em dash #9; (2) '不是...而是...' contrast pattern replaced with direct descriptive appositive. Both anti-AI MINOR issues resolved in single change.

spot_fixes.original: 那扇门在他的意识里静静地散发着微弱的信号，像一堵墙在承受过压力之后，墙体内部发生了变化，表面看不出裂缝，但结构已经变了。
spot_fixes.revised: 那扇门在他的意识里静静地散发着微弱的信号，像一口被敲响过的钟，振动早已平息，但铜壁内部还在发生细微的结构调整。
spot_fixes.rationale: Pacing audit MINOR: wall metaphor consumed two descriptions without clearly anchoring 'internal state change' — replaced with bell metaphor where '被敲响→平息的振动→铜壁内部结构调整' is a more precise physical analogy for the door having been touched and then responding internally. Resonance P1 also noted explanatory-over-suggestive issue with original wall image.

preserved_elements.element: 一种微弱的、像风吹过门缝的气息感——不是温度变化，不是声音，是一种位移的感知
preserved_elements.reason: Legitimate use of em dash for definition cascade — establishes door's first-ever autonomous signal. Not part of any anti-AI pattern.

preserved_elements.element: 一切物理秩序都正常。但意识里的那扇门，它的状态变了。
preserved_elements.reason: Core narrative rhythm of chapter — contrast between physical and psychic worlds. Preserved as-is.

acceptance_check.improvement_details: 1 '不是...而是...' pattern eliminated. 1 dramatic pause em dash (#9) eliminated. Door metaphor refined for precision. No blocking/critical introduced. Content preservation verified — no dialogue, no character state changes, no scene transitions altered.

items.item: MH-020 首次文本证据（手机震动+梅德兰文字闪现）
门自发反馈（气息感/位移感知——灵能确认真实）
中年女人第三次相遇（白线标记+检查站招工+动机信号）
灰衬衫过路费征收场景（S-006从目击→体验升级）
城外矿道传闻（第7章转移种子）
救济站重返感官追加（Ch5 drift补偿）
章末三联收束（铜币/标记/门）
